title: ST ALPHONSUS MEDICAL CENTER - 211info
text: SAINT ALPHONSUS MEDICAL CENTER ST ALPHONSUS MEDICAL CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general medical care, intensive care, rehabilitation, respiratory therapy, laboratory services, radiology, obstetrics, surgery, post-anesthesia recovery, wellness and community education, and emergency care. Community events include an annual blood draw and health fair, a free breast cancer screening clinic followed by reduced rate screening mammograms, junior high and high school sports physicals, and flu vaccine clinics. 351 SW 9th Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Emergency Room: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Other services: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 881-7000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 881-7000 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or walk in for emergencies FEES: OHP, payments, financial grant program, private insurance DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Malheur County Services: Emergency Room Care Hospitals Urgent Care Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAINT ALPHONSUS MEDICAL CENTER
